name: concurrent fetch attempts on the same source serialize via the sectioned advisory lock contract
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/locks fixtures && printf '{"number":1,"merged":true}\n' > fixtures/prs.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb --upstream-stub fixtures/prs.jsonl --section pr-corpus --simulate-concurrent --lock-dir .claude-tdd-pro/locks 2>out.txt && grep -q 'lock_acquired=true' out.txt && grep -q 'serialized=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
